calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-14-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-14-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

John Dresslar, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Aurora Loan Services, LLC.
Raul Pangilinan, Agent for Founder's Realty, was placed under oath and examined.
J. Steven Franco, Esq. appeared with defendant Americo A. Claros, who was placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on November 23, 2009.
Default as to All Unknown Occupants was filed on November 23, 2009.

Terms of the Stipulated Judgment were put on the record by Mr. Dresslar.

Past-Due Rent & Holdover Damages - $5,880.00.
Attorney Fees - $700.00.
Costs - $300.00.
Total - $6,880.00.

Additionally, plaintiff is entitled to possession and restitution of the premises located at 1147 Palou Avenue, Main House, San Francisco, CA 94124. The lease is forfeited. Enforcement of the Judgment shall be stayed to January 25, 2010. If defendant Americo A. Claros vacates the subject premises on or before January 25, 2010, plaintiff shall waive all damages, attorney fees & costs. The subject premises shall be left in good condition, and defendant shall turn in the key to the premises to plaintiff.

If defendant complies with the terms set forth above, plaintiff Aurora Loan Services, LLC shall pay defendant Americo A. Claros the sum of $2,500.00, and a satisfaction of judgment shall be filed with the Court.

Defendant Americo A. Claros wa placed under oath and voir dired by the Court as to the terms and her understanding of the agreement.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than December 18, 2009.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle

*The trial date of DEC-14-2009 remains on calendar.
